sigWerErrors.reason: 'Shoot' is an interjection added at the beginning, but it does not change the meaning of the main sentence. It is a minor addition.
One repetition of 'hold on' is missing, but the overall meaning and intent are unchanged.
Changing 'it is got to be annoying' to 'that is got to be annoying' does not significantly alter the meaning in this context.
'alright' was transcribed as 'all right', which are semantically equivalent.
